title: Kart's Chaotic Kit
description: My every day use minecraft modpack for Survival / Creative / SMP's
body:
# Kart's Chaotic Kit

**Kart's Chaotic Kit** is **Kartonek's** _(mine)_ modpack for **stoneworks minecraft server** it includes many **Performance**, **Visual Enhancement** and **QoL** mods.

![In Game Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Fp1xKkvp/images/9ca1fb4edf3e1016a88978a6c6a90aaa5bfe432f.png)

# Custom Keybinds

| Key | Action | Mod |
|-----|--------|-----|
| 0 | Builder Tool Slot | Axiom |
| Right Shift | Toggle Editor UI | Axiom |
| . | Gender Menu | Wildfire Gender |
| V | Zoom | CameraUtils |
| C | Inspect Item Animation | Hold My Items |
| ` | Open Chest Tracker | ChestTracker |
| K | Edit Command Keys | CommandKeys |
| H | Night Vision Toggle | GammaUtils |
| ] | Toggle Health Rendering | HealthIndicators |
| [ | Open Health Config | HealthIndicators |
| U | Open HeyWiki Search | HeyWiki |
| F4 | Toggle Freecam | Legacy Freecam |
| ' | Toggle Name Tags | NameTagToggle |
| Enter | View NBT Item | NBTViewer |
| O | Open Skin Overrides | Skin Overrides |
| G | Open Crosshair Editor | CustomCrosshair |
| Y | Item Search | WhereIsIt |
| \ | Open World Map | Xaero’s World Map |

If you have any sugestions or problems with the mod contact me on any of my comunication channels [My Links Website](https://link.karton.dev/)
